untranslatable_reason: Horn Bottom pattern requires precise detection of TWO separate downward spikes separated by ~1 week with specific spatial relationship (inverted horn shape). This multi-bar, time-dependent pattern cannot be reliably expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern requires tracking spike magnitude, recovery behavior over a specific 5-7 day window, and geometric positioning across multiple bars—beyond the scope of point-in-time indicator comparisons.
